name: Hidden Window Process Execution
description: Detects processes launched with hidden or minimized windows to avoid detection
query:
// Detect hidden window execution
// Trigger on -WindowStyle Hidden or Start-Process -NoNewWindow
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(-WindowStyle\s+Hidden|-w\s+hidden|Start-Process.*-NoNewWindow|/b\s+start.*\/min)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
